summary: Incredible second‑set sound with the newer Go to Heaven tunes shining brightly
review: The reviewer raves about the crystal‑clear audio on the second set, calling it "incredible." They also highlight that the fresh material from the recent Go to Heaven album really shines in this performance. Overall the show is portrayed as a standout New Year's Eve outing with top‑notch sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed 5‑star review; it praises both the musical performance (new Go to Heaven songs) and the recording quality (incredible sound on set two), suggesting an exceptional show despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Second‑set audio described as "incredible," indicating clear, vivid sound with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out for its energy and the fresh Go to Heaven material; overall flow praised by the reviewer.
